description:
Name: Eliza Heavyfield

Proficiency: War

Birth: Sokolovka

Age: Classified

Affiliation(s): Frauleins
title: Fraulein der Krieg
unit_description: The pointman of the Fraulein's Team Zero. The toughest operator in the Frauleins and loves warfare for the sake of it. A bottle of liquor and some ammo is all she needs to be convinced to fight for a cause. Unlike most Frauleins, she bonds well with her fellow soldiers.
